# Claude Code Changelog

## 1.3.0 (2024-03-20)

### New Features
- Added support for MCP servers
- Improved context window management

### Bug Fixes
- Fixed crash on large repositories
- Resolved issue with file permissions on Linux

## 1.2.1 (2024-02-10)

### Bug Fixes
- Fixed memory leak in long-running sessions
- Corrected date display in diff view

## 1.2.0 (2024-01-15)

### New Features
- Introduced hooks system
- Added `/review` slash command

### Improvements
- Faster file indexing
